property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0

testcase.name: AsyncProcess: Array is processed successfully
AsyncProcess: If non-array is passed, error callback is called
AsyncProcess: If an empty array is passed, returns initial array
AsyncProcess: If no process function passed, returns initial array
VideoPlayer completion: calls the completion api when marking an object complete
VideoPlayer completion: calls the completion api on the LMS when the time updates
VideoPlayer completion: does not call the completion api on the LMS when the video is loaded but not seen
VideoPlayer completion: calls the completion api on the LMS when the video ends
VideoPlayer completion: calls the completion api if the video is age restricted
VideoPlayer Events: initialize
VideoPlayer Events: ready
VideoPlayer Events: play
VideoPlayer Events: pause
VideoPlayer Events: volumechange
VideoPlayer Events: speedchange
VideoPlayer Events: seek
VideoPlayer Events: ended
VideoPlayer Events: qualitychange
Video: check videoType
Video: set the elements
Video: parse the videos
Video: parse available video speeds
Video: set current video speed via cookie
Video: check videoType
Video: set the elements
Video: doesn't have `videos` dictionary
Video: parse available video speeds
Video: set current video speed via cookie
Video: create the Video Player
Video: callback, to be called after YouTube API loads, exists and is called
Video: both times are proper
Video: start time is invalid
Video: end time is invalid
Video: start time is less than 0
Video: start time is greater than end time
Video: check for YT availability is performed only once
Initialize: returns current language
Initialize: returns `en`, if language isn't available for the video
Initialize: returns any available language, if current and `en` languages aren't available for the video
Initialize: returns `null`, if transcript unavailable
Initialize: returns duration for the 1.0 speed if speed is not 1.0
Initialize: returns duration for current video
Initialize: returns duration for the 1.0 speed as a fall-back
Initialize: return the video id for given speed
Initialize: return the video id for current speed
Initialize: return the video id for 1.0x speed
Initialize: return the video id for 1.0x speed
Initialize: check mapping
Initialize: set new speed
Initialize: set new speed
Initialize: set speed to 1.0x
Initialize: check mapping
Initialize: updates player mode
Initialize: sets default mode if passed is not supported
Initialize: returns current player mode
Initialize: returns `true` if player in `flash` mode
Initialize: returns `false` if player is not in `flash` mode
Initialize: returns `true` if player in `html5` mode
Initialize: returns `false` if player is not in `html5` mode
Iterator: size contains correct list length
Iterator: returns next item in the list
Iterator: returns first item if index equal last item
Iterator: returns next item if index is not valid
Iterator: returns next item in the list
Iterator: returns first item if index equal last item
Iterator: returns previous item in the list
Iterator: returns last item if index equal first item
Iterator: returns previous item if index is not valid
Iterator: returns previous item in the list
Iterator: returns last item if index equal first item
Iterator: returns last item in the list
Iterator: returns first item in the list
Iterator: isEnd works correctly
Resizer: When Initialize without required parameters, log message is shown
Resizer: `alignByWidthOnly` works correctly
Resizer: `alignByHeightOnly` works correctly
Resizer: `align` works correctly
Resizer: `setMode` works correctly
Resizer: `setElement` works correctly
Resizer: callbacks are called
Resizer: callback called just once
Resizer: all callbacks are removed
Resizer: specific callback is removed
Resizer: Error message is shown when wrong argument type is passed
Resizer: adding delta align correctly by height
Resizer: adding delta align correctly by width
Resizer: substract delta align correctly by height
Resizer: substract delta align correctly by width
Resizer: reset delta
Sjson: returns captions
Sjson: returns start times
Sjson: returns correct length
Sjson: search returns a correct caption index
Sjson: search returns the last entry for a value outside the bounds of the array
Sjson: search returns the first entry for a negative index in the array
Sjson: search only searches through a subrange of times if start / end times are specified
Sjson: filters results correctly given a start and end time
VideoSocialSharingHandler: twitter
VideoSocialSharingHandler: facebook
VideoSocialSharingHandler: linkedin
Video Context Menu: the structure should be created on first `contextmenu` call
Video Context Menu: add ARIA attributes to menu, menu items, submenu and submenu items
Video Context Menu: is not used by Youtube type of video player
Video Context Menu: menu can be destroyed successfully
Video Context Menu: can change label for the submenu
Video Context Menu: can change label for the menuitem
Video Context Menu: context menu opens
Video Context Menu: mouseover and mouseleave behave as expected
Video Context Menu: mouse left-clicking outside of the context menu will close it
Video Context Menu: mouse right-clicking outside of video will close it
Video Context Menu: mouse right-clicking inside video but outside of context menu will not close it
Video Context Menu: mouse right-clicking inside video but outside of context menu will close submenus
Video Context Menu: mouse left/right-clicking behaves as expected on play/pause menu item
Video Context Menu: mouse left/right-clicking behaves as expected on mute/unmute menu item
Video Context Menu: mouse left/right-clicking behaves as expected on go to Exit full browser menu item
Video Context Menu: mouse left/right-clicking behaves as expected on speed submenu item
Video Context Menu: focus the first item of the just opened menu on UP keydown
Video Context Menu: focus the last item of the just opened menu on DOWN keydown
Video Context Menu: open the submenu on ENTER keydown
Video Context Menu: open the submenu on SPACE keydown
Video Context Menu: open the submenu on RIGHT keydown
Video Context Menu: close the menu on ESCAPE keydown
Video Context Menu: close the submenu on ESCAPE keydown
Video Context Menu: close the submenu on LEFT keydown on submenu items
Video Context Menu: do nothing on RIGHT keydown on submenu item
Video Context Menu: do nothing on TAB keydown on menu item
Video Context Menu: UP and DOWN keydown function as expected on menu/submenu items
Video Context Menu: current item is still focused if all siblings are hidden
Video Context Menu: ENTER keydown on menu/submenu item selects its data and closes menu
Video Context Menu: SPACE keydown on menu/submenu item selects its data and closes menu
Video FocusGrabber: check existence of focus grabber elements and their position
Video FocusGrabber: from the start, focus grabbers are disabled
Video FocusGrabber: when first focus grabber is focused "mousemove" event is triggered, grabbers are disabled
Video FocusGrabber: when last focus grabber is focused "mousemove" event is triggered, grabbers are disabled
Video FocusGrabber: after controls hide focus grabbers are enabled
VideoFullScreen: renders the fullscreen control
VideoFullScreen: correctly adds ARIA attributes to fullscreen control
VideoFullScreen: correctly triggers the event handler to toggle fullscreen mode
VideoFullScreen: correctly updates ARIA on state change
VideoFullScreen: correctly can out of fullscreen by pressing esc
VideoFullScreen: can update video dimensions on state change
VideoFullScreen: can destroy itself
VideoFullScreen: Controls height is actual on switch to fullscreen
VideoPlayPauseControl: can render the control
VideoPlayPauseControl: add ARIA attributes to play control
VideoPlayPauseControl: can update ARIA state on play
VideoPlayPauseControl: can update ARIA state on video ends
VideoPlayPauseControl: can update state on pause
VideoPlayPauseControl: can start video playing on click
VideoPlayPauseControl: can destroy itself
VideoPlayPlaceholder: works correctly on calling proper methods
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is not shown onPC
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is shown oniPad
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is shown onAndroid
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is not shown oniPhone
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is shown on paused video on iPad in HTML5 player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is hidden on playing video on iPad in HTML5 player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is hidden on paused video on iPad in YouTube player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is shown on paused video on Android in HTML5 player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is hidden on playing video on Android in HTML5 player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: is hidden on paused video on Android in YouTube player
VideoPlayPlaceholder: starts play the video on click
VideoPlayPlaceholder: can destroy itself
VideoPlaySkipControl: can render the control
VideoPlaySkipControl: can update state on play
VideoPlaySkipControl: can start video playing on click
VideoPlaySkipControl: can skip the video on click
VideoPlaySkipControl: can destroy itself
VideoQualityControl: contains the quality control and is initially hidden
VideoQualityControl: add ARIA attributes to quality control
VideoQualityControl: bind the quality control
VideoQualityControl: calls fetchAvailableQualities only once
VideoQualityControl: initializes with a quality equal to large
VideoQualityControl: shows the quality control on play if HD is available
VideoQualityControl: leaves quality control hidden on play if HD is not available
VideoQualityControl: switch to HD if it is available
VideoQualityControl: quality control is active if HD is available
VideoQualityControl: can destroy itself
VideoQualityControl: does not contain the quality control
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data is not an object, async is true
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data contains speed, async is false
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data contains float position, async is true
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data contains speed and rounded position, async is false
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data contains empty object, async is true
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: data contains position 0, async is true
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can save state on speed change
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can save state on page unload
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can save state on pause
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can save state on language change
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can save youtube availability
VideoPlayer Save State plugin: can destroy itself
VideoSkipControl: can render the control when video starts playing
VideoSkipControl: can skip the video on click
VideoSkipControl: can destroy itself
VideoStorage: with namespace and id
VideoStorage: without namespace and id
VideoStorage: setItem
VideoStorage: getItem
VideoStorage: removeItem
VideoStorage: clear
VideoTranscriptFeedback: instantiates widget and handlers along with necessary data
VideoTranscriptFeedback: checks if transcript was AI generated
VideoTranscriptFeedback: shows widget if transcript is AI generated
VideoTranscriptFeedback: hides widget if transcript is not AI generated
VideoTranscriptFeedback: hides widget if transcript is AI generated but is still in progress
VideoTranscriptFeedback: hides widget if query for transcript AI generated fails
VideoTranscriptFeedback: checks if feedback exists for AI generated transcript
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs up button if feedback exists and it is positive
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs down button if feedback exists and it is negative
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs up buttons as empty if feedback does not exist
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs up buttons as empty if query fails
VideoTranscriptFeedback: calls loadAndSetVisibility if language changed
VideoTranscriptFeedback: does not call loadAndSetVisibility if language did not change
VideoTranscriptFeedback: sends positive feedback if there is no current feedback
VideoTranscriptFeedback: sends empty feedback if there is a current positive feedback
VideoTranscriptFeedback: sends negative feedback if there is no current feedback
VideoTranscriptFeedback: sends empty feedback if there is a current negative feedback
VideoTranscriptFeedback: sends proper request to ai translation service
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs up button as selected if response is positive
VideoTranscriptFeedback: marks thumbs down button as selected if response is negative
VideoTranscriptFeedback: unselects thumbs buttons if response is empty
VideoVolumeControl: Volume level has correct value even if cookie is broken
VideoVolumeControl: initialize volume to 75%
VideoVolumeControl: render the volume control
VideoVolumeControl: create the slider
VideoVolumeControl: add ARIA attributes to live region
VideoVolumeControl: add ARIA attributes to volume control
VideoVolumeControl: bind the volume control
VideoVolumeControl: update is not called, if new volume equals current
VideoVolumeControl: volume is changed on sliding
VideoVolumeControl: set the player volume
VideoVolumeControl: remove muted class
VideoVolumeControl: remove muted class
VideoVolumeControl: set the player volume
VideoVolumeControl: add muted class
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is Muted
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is in ]0,20]
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is in ]20,40]
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is in ]40,60]
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is in ]60,80]
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is in ]80,100[
VideoVolumeControl: when the new volume is Maximum
VideoVolumeControl: volume is increased correctly
VideoVolumeControl: volume level is not changed if it is already max
VideoVolumeControl: volume is decreased correctly
VideoVolumeControl: volume level is not changed if it is already min
VideoVolumeControl: save the previous volume
VideoVolumeControl: set the player volume
VideoVolumeControl: set the player volume to previous volume
VideoVolumeControl: nothing happens if ALT+keyUp are pushed down
VideoVolumeControl: nothing happens if SHIFT+keyUp are pushed down
VideoVolumeControl: nothing happens if SHIFT+keyDown are pushed down
VideoVolumeControl: nothing happens if ALT+ENTER are pushed down
VideoAutoAdvance: no auto-advance button is shown
VideoAutoAdvance: when video ends, it will not auto-advance to next unit
VideoAutoAdvance: an active auto-advance button is shown
VideoAutoAdvance: when button is clicked, it will deactivate auto-advance
VideoAutoAdvance: when video ends, it will auto-advance to next unit
VideoAutoAdvance: an inactive auto-advance button is shown
VideoAutoAdvance: when the button is clicked, it will activate auto-advance
VideoAutoAdvance: when video ends, it will not auto-advance to next unit

VideoPlayer Events plugin: returns current time adjusted by startTime if video starts from a subsection
VideoPlayer Events plugin: returns 0 if currentTime is undefined
VideoPlayer Events plugin: returns unadjusted current time if startTime is not defined
VideoPlayer Events plugin: logs event with adjusted duration when startTime and endTime are defined

VideoPlayer Events plugin: can not emit "play_video" event when emitPlayVideoEvent is false

VideoPlayer Events plugin: returns 0 if currentTime is undefined

VideoControl: saved position is after start-time, timer slider and VCR set to saved position

VideoCaption: fetch the transcript in Youtube mode

VideoCaption: on success: re-rendered correct

VideoCaption: on success: language menu isn't rendered if translations unavailable

VideoCaption: set playing to false
